body:
## Sprint
- Sprint ID: `S15`
- Objective: Add an optional in-app terminal panel that uses the exact same command executor, whitelists, and receipts/event pipeline as existing GUI actions so terminal usage cannot drift or bypass safeguards.

## Whitelist + Budgets
- Whitelist used: `src/s15/**`, `tests/s15/**`, `src/**` (integration only), `tests/**` (harness only), `docs/backlog/**`, `docs/sprints/README.md`, `docs/sprints/S15/**`.
- Existing-file net-new budget: `<=120` lines (docs excluded).
- Existing-file max LOC budget: `<=1200`.
- Function length budget: `<=80` lines.
- Budget receipts: `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/scope/03_numstat_budget_eval.txt`, `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/maintainability/06_budget_eval.md`.

## AT Checklist
- [x] AT-S15-01 Commands run in terminal panel produce identical receipt schema keys as GUI tool runs.
- [x] AT-S15-02 Disallowed commands are blocked and recorded as security events.
- [x] AT-S15-03 Terminal commands do not bypass out-of-sync detection hard-stop.

## Marker Lists Used
### HTML markers
- `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`

### Determinism markers
- `Date.now(`
- `Math.random(`

### Storage markers
- `localStorage(`
- `sessionStorage(`

### Hardpath markers
- `PROMPTOPS_REPO=`
- `/Volumes/`
- `/Users/`
- `~/`

## Evidence Paths
- `docs/sprints/S15/README.md`
- `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/INDEX.md`
- `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/preflight/*`
- `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/gates/*`
- `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/at/*`
- `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/scope/*`
- `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/maintainability/*`
- `docs/sprints/S15/evidence/stoplight/*`
title: [S15] devx : terminal panel
